# Quid

> Quid is an AI-assisted admissions concierge for senior living communities. It helps admissions teams respond to website inquiries, coordinate tours, follow up consistently, and route sensitive questions to staff.

## Website

- Homepage: https://get-quid.site/
- See Quid in Action: https://get-quid.site/see-quid-in-action
- How It Works: https://get-quid.site/how-it-works
- Human Handoffs: https://get-quid.site/human-handoffs
- 30-Day Pilot: https://get-quid.site/pilot
- Meet Quid: https://get-quid.site/meet-quid
- Resources: https://get-quid.site/resources

## Product Summary

Quid supports routine senior living admissions follow-up. It is not a senior living facility, care provider, CRM replacement, clinical decision tool, or medical advice system.

Quid helps with:
- website inquiry acknowledgement
- tour coordination
- approved follow-up
- stalled inquiry tracking
- daily admissions summaries
- human handoffs for sensitive questions

Quid does not:
- provide care
- make clinical decisions
- recommend levels of care
- discuss medications
- determine eligibility
- guarantee move-ins
- replace admissions staff
